creator: truckman@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to John Marino from comment #4)
> Are the -current builders old?
> http://portsmon.freebsd.org/portoverview.py?category=lang&portname=guile
> 
> It says guile is building fine.

I never had problems building the port.  The problem was that ports that depended on it didn't work.

As mentioned in #3, I'm no longer able to reproduce the problem.  Doing some bisection to find the root cause has been on my TODO list for a while.
